description_long: This apartment building features a rectangular, stone-textured facade with three main stories and a flat roof. The front side displays a series of colorful balconies with metal railings, each corresponding to a window, and a ground-level entrance door. The building is set on a raised platform bordered by a stone wall and surrounded by a paved sidewalk and road, with a metal fence running along the perimeter. The rear and side walls are plain, with minimal window openings, while the left side features a large billboard. The structure's overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, with a focus on function over ornate detail. The color palette includes beige stone, green, red, and brown balcony accents, and gray pavement.
description: A three-story stone apartment building with colorful balconies, flat roofs, and a raised platform surrounded by a paved sidewalk and metal fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with three stories, colorful balconies, windows, and a ground-level entrance door.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the plain stone wall and the protruding balconies, with the sidewalk and fence visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned stone back of the building and the rooftop layout.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a large billboard on the wall, the side of the balconies, and the surrounding pavement and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, each paired with a balcony on the front facade, evenly spaced across all floors.
